name: Conger Park
description: Conger Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jackson, TN. There are 18 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Lights are set to turn off at midnight.

name: Jackson Country Club
description: Jackson Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, TN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Northside Church Pickleball
description:
The church provides play for free.  They ask that you join their GroupMe account and sign a waiver before you play.  Contact Ken Chilcutt, Phone:  731.668.0617, Office Hours:  Monday-Thursday, 8am-4pm.  

Ball: Outdoor Onix Fuse

name: South Jackson Community Center
description: South Jackson Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, TN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
